# Image Attribution

This folder contains images collected from various external websites.  
Images are organized into sub-folders, where each sub-folder name corresponds to the original source website domain (e.g., `example.com/`, `another-site.org/`).

## Source Information

Each image remains the property of its respective copyright holder.  
The original source website for each image can be identified by the name of the sub-folder in which the image is located.

## License Notice

Licenses and usage rights may vary between images and sources.  
No blanket license applies to all images in this folder.

Users of this repository are responsible for reviewing and complying with the license terms of each image as specified by its original source website.

If you are a copyright holder and believe an image has been included improperly, please contact the repository maintainer for prompt resolution.
